name: VersionNumber
summary: Represents a product version number that encodes major, minor, time and build branch information. as major.minor.yyddd.hhmmb where: yy = year of build - 2000 ddd = year day of build (1-366) hh = hour of build mm = minute of build b = branch of build

constructors.name: VersionNumber(Version)
constructors.summary: Construct VersionNumber based on existing System.Version class.

constructors.name: VersionNumber(Int32, Int32, DateTime, VersionNumber.Branch)
constructors.signature: public VersionNumber(int major, int minor, DateTime time, VersionNumber.Branch buildBranch)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the VersionNumber structure to the version specified by the parameters.

params.name: time
params.doc: The time is the version time (January 1, 2000 00:00 through December 31 23:59). Seconds are ignored.

params.name: buildBranch
params.doc: The branch used to build the product (developer, trunk, release_candidate, or release).

constructors.name: VersionNumber(Int32, Int32, Int32, Int32)
constructors.signature: public VersionNumber(int majorVersionNumber, int minorVersionNumber, int versionQuartetYyddd, int versionQuartetHhmmb)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the VersionNumber structure to the version specified by the version quartet values.

params.name: versionQuartetYyddd
params.doc: The third version quartet value is (year - 2000)*1000 + yday, where year is 2000 to 2099 and yday is 1 to the number of days in the specified year.

params.name: versionQuartetHhmmb
params.doc: The forth version quartet value is (hour*1000 + minute*10 + branch) where hour is 0 to 23, minute is 0 to 59, and branch is 0 to 3.

methods.name: CompareTo(Object)
methods.summary: Compares the value of this instance to a specified VersionNumber value and returns an integer that indicates whether this instance is earlier than, the same as, or later than the specified VersionNumber value.

params.name: value
params.doc: The object to compare to the current instance.

returns.doc: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and the value parameter. Less than zero indicates this instance is earier than value. Zero indicates this instance is the same as value. Greater than zero indicates this instance is later than value.

methods.name: CompareTo(VersionNumber)
methods.summary: Compares the value of this instance to a specified VersionNumber value and returns an integer that indicates whether this instance is earlier than, the same as, or later than the specified VersionNumber value.

params.name: value
params.doc: The object to compare to the current instance.

returns.doc: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and the value parameter. Less than zero indicates this instance is earier than value. Zero indicates this instance is the same as value. Greater than zero indicates this instance is later than value.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Converts the value of the current VersionNumber object to its equivalent string representation major.minor.yyddd.hhmmb. (Overrides ValueType.ToString().)

methods.name: ToVersion
methods.summary: Convert this VersionNumber class to System.Version()

methods.name: TryParse(String, VersionNumber)
methods.signature: public static bool TryParse(string s, out VersionNumber result)
methods.summary: Converts the specified string representation of a version number to its VersionNumber equivalent and returns a value that indicates whether the conversion succeeded.

params.name: s
params.doc: A string containing four integers separated by full stops in the format major.minor.yyddd.hhmmb, where yy is year-2000, ddd is the day of the year, hh is the hour, mm is the minute and b identifies the build branch.

params.name: result
params.doc: When this method returns, result contains the VersionNumber value equivalent to the version number contained in s, if the conversion succeeded, or VersionNumber.Unset if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the s parameter is null, is an empty string (""), or does not contain a valid string representation of version number. This parameter is passed uninitialized.

methods.name: TryParse(Version, VersionNumber)
methods.signature: public static bool TryParse(Version v, out VersionNumber result)
methods.summary: Attempt so convert the System.Version representation of a version number to its VersionNumber equivalent and returns a value that indicates whether the conversion succeeded.

params.name: v
params.doc: A version number with quartet values (v.Major, v.Minor, v.Build, v.Revision) that are valid ((0 to 63),(0 to 127), (1 to 99365), (0 to 23593)).

params.name: result
params.doc: When this method returns, result contains the VersionNumber value equivalent to the version number contained in v, if the conversion succeeded, or VersionNumber.Unset if the conversion failed. The conversion fails if the v parameter is null, is an empty string (""), or does not contain a valid string representation of version number. This parameter is passed uninitialized.

properties.name: BuildBranch
properties.summary: Gets the build branch component of this instance.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: True when all information in the VersionNumber has valid values.

properties.name: Major
properties.summary: Gets the major version number component of this instance.

properties.name: MaxMajorVersionNumber
properties.summary: The largest possible valid value of VersionNumber.MajorVersionNumber.

properties.name: MaxMinorVersionNumber
properties.summary: The largest possible valid value of VersionNumber.MinorVersionNumber.

properties.name: MaxValidBuildBranch
properties.summary: Represents the largest possible valid value of VersionNumber.BuildBranch. This field is read-only.

properties.name: MaxValidTime
properties.summary: The largest possible valid value of VersionNumber.Time. This field is read-only.

properties.name: MinMajorVersionNumber
properties.summary: The smallest possible valid value of VersionNumber.MajorVersionNumber.

properties.name: MinMinorVersionNumber
properties.summary: The smallest possible valid value of VersionNumber.MinorVersionNumber.

properties.name: Minor
properties.summary: Gets the minor version number component of this instance.

properties.name: MinValidBuildBranch
properties.summary: Represents the smallest possible valid value of VersionNumber.BuildBranch. This field is read-only.

properties.name: MinValidTime
properties.summary: The smallest possible valid value of VersionNumber.Time. This field is read-only.

properties.name: Time
properties.summary: Gets the version time component of this instance.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: The Unset VersionNumber. VersionNumber.Unset.IsValid is false.

properties.name: UnsetBuildBranch
properties.summary: The value of an Unset VersionNumber.BuildBranch.

properties.name: UnsetTime
properties.summary: The value of an Unset VersionNumber.Time.
